# Transcrição: 01-Introduction

## [00:00 - 02:47]

Week three, 10X financing. Grant Cardone back with you. Look, you're into week three of the 10X business buying accelerator. This module is about you finding and securing financing for your deal. Brandon and his team have a ton of material to cover with you this week. This might just be the most important part of your blueprint. Up to this point, you've been able to find a business that you want to buy. Model the deal to acquire that business. Make the offer and negotiate. But without the information in this module, your deal is not going to get done. You're going to need the financing to acquire the business while keeping your out-of-pocket cash to a very minimum. So this week, Brandon will make sure you have your tools, the tools you need to ensure that you're going to succeed. Remember the goal of this course is to show you how to acquire your business, the business that you've chosen by using little to none of your own money. To do that, we'll talk about how to leverage things inside the business that you're trying to buy to secure your financing instead of you putting your own capital. We're going to start by briefly covering all the financing options available and when and why to use those options. The two big financing tools we're going to start with is debt financing, where you'll raise money by creating a debt in the business that's owed to the financiers. You'll also learn about personal credibility loans, asset back loans, cash flow loans, seller notes, and much more. Then Brandon and his team will cover equity financing, where you'll give a stake of the business to gain financing from another. And it's worth noting not all these financing types are ideal for the business that you've chosen. By the end of this course, though, you'll have a good understanding of each one, why you'd want to use one over the other, the benefits, the downsides, etc. You'll also learn about the SBA, Small Business Administration loans. Then you'll learn about seller financing and earnouts, where the seller is basically helping you purchase the business in exchange for an ongoing payment, very attractive to a lot of sellers. You'll also learn about earning your way into business through entrepreneurship. Brandon has an awesome story for you about his strategy that he can share with you that will benefit you in the future. He'll also go into details about how these deals work, what kind of requirements they typically have, how to structure that deal, and how and when you should start reaching out to financiers. This is a powerful, powerful module. Don't underestimate it. Let's get started. Let Brandon show you the way how to get your financing, the perfect financing package for your perfect business.
